title: SCON: School Counselling Ontology Network
description: A modular, BFO-grounded, reasoning-enabled OWL 2 DL ontology for comprehensive counselling across the academic, career, and social-emotional domains in school and higher-education settings, engineered to support intelligent counselling systems.

creators.name: Bakariwie, Amiru
